title: dehaasia elliptica
intro: Dehaasia elliptica, also known as Indian Magnolia or Bokhurya, is a plant species that belongs to the family Lauraceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, cough, and respiratory issues due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Dehaasia elliptica include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. Dehaasia elliptica is traditionally prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and its bark is also used to make a medicinal oil or tincture.
